acholi.estimate_the_value_the_arrow_points_to: Tam value ma arrow nyuto (namba ma cok loyo).
acholi.click_the_number_line_above_to_place_a: Dii number line ma malo ka ket marker.
acholi.number_line_marker_use_arrow_keys_to_m: Number line marker. Ti ki arrow keys me kobo, Home/End pi endpoints, Shift pi step madoŋo.
acholi.number_line_fractions_above_decimals_b: 📏 Number line — fractions malo, decimals piny
acholi.same_amount_three_more_visuals_quantit: 🔄 Kwan acel, visual 3 mukene. Kwan gubedo acel i kit nyutu ducu.
acholi.this_decimal_repeats_forever: Decimal man nwoyo pi kare ducu
acholi.move_the_marker_by_a_fraction_fraction: ➕➖ Kob marker ki fraction — fraction arithmetic i line
acholi.click_a_chip_below_the_marker_slides_a: Dii chip ma piny. Marker cwalo; visual 4 ducu lokke. Line medde kene ka ikato ŋet.
acholi.common_denominator_hunter_how_to_add_f: 🤝 Common-denominator hunter — kit me medo fractions ki denominators mapatpat
acholi.you_cannot_add_1_2_1_3_directly_first_: Pe itwero medo 1/2 + 1/3 atir. Kwongo nong denominator acel (LCM tiyo), lok nying fraction acel acel, ka imed numerators.
acholi.equivalent_fractions_same_point_many_n: ∞ Equivalent fractions — kabedo acel, nyiŋ mapol. Dii me poko line odoco.
acholi.multiply_or_divide_the_top_and_bottom_: Nyap (onyo pok) malo KI piny ki namba acel → value acel, nyiŋ mapat. Marker pe kobbe.
acholi.a_quarter_is_0_25_1_4_of_a_dollar_a_di: Quarter obedo $0.25 = 1/4 me dollar. Dime obedo $0.10 = 1/10. Coins gin decimal-fraction practice.
acholi.every_decimal_place_is_a_fraction_1st_: Decimal place ducu obedo fraction. 1st place: tenths, 2nd: hundredths, 3rd: thousandths.
acholi.reset_frac_dec_tab_to_defaults: Dwoko Frac Dec tab i defaults
acholi.why_fractions_and_decimals_are_the_sam: 💡 Piŋo fractions ki decimals gin gin acel
acholi.3_4_means_3_divided_by_4_type_3_4_into: 3/4 te lok ni "3 poko ki 4." Coo 3 ÷ 4 i calculator moro keken: 0.75. Slash ki ÷ gitero lok acel.
acholi.a_decimal_is_a_fraction_with_a_hidden_: Decimal obedo fraction ki denominator ma opondo.
acholi.0_6_means_6_tenths_6_10_0_25_means_25_: 0.6 te lok ni "tenths 6," 6/10. 0.25 te lok ni "hundredths 25," 25/100, ma dwoko i 1/4.
acholi.the_point_at_1_4_is_the_same_point_as_: Point i 1/4 obedo point acel calo point i 0.25. Kabedo acel, nyiŋ aryo.
acholi.1_2_0_5_stops_1_4_0_25_stops_1_3_0_333: 1/2 = 0.5 (cung). 1/4 = 0.25 (cung). 1/3 = 0.333… (nwoyo pi kare ducu). Denominator moko: ka pokke keken i 2 ki 5, cung. Ka pe, nwoyo. Neno ↻ i decimal card.
acholi.focus_explore_body: Yer range, med markers, ki pim distances.
acholi.focus_challenges_body: Lube i tammo, rounding, ki nongo values.
acholi.focus_frac_body: Riŋ fractions, decimals, percents, ki area models.
acholi.focus_compare_body: Tem fraction size relationships labongo score.
acholi.focus_summary: Ti ki line acel me nongo values, nyutu jumps, ki riŋo equivalent forms.
acholi.explore_the_visual_home_for_number_sen: Yeny — ot me neno pi number sense
acholi.numbers_as_positions_on_a_line_not_jus: Numbers calo kabedo i line, pe symbols keken. Negatives nyuto i ŋet zero. Fractions gubedo I KIN integers; decimals gin tam acel ento matidi. Common Core 2.MD.6, 3.NF.2, 6.NS.6.
acholi.where_does_7_8_sit_what_about_2_4_esti: 7/8 obedo kwene? Ki −2.4? Tammo gero magnitude sense. Studies (Siegler 2009) nyuto ni number-line precision tammo math success me anyim maber loyo rote facts.
acholi.skip_count_the_bridge_to_multiplicatio: Skip Count — the bridge to multiplication
acholi.2_4_6_8_the_2_times_table_walking_skip: 2, 4, 6, 8… = 2 times table ma woto. Skip counting ki 5 ki 10 yubo money ki time. Kwan cen ki 3 yubo subtraction ki division. Line nyuto kwer.
acholi.fractions_decimals_same_point_two_name: Fractions ↔ Decimals, kabedo acel, nyiŋ aryo
acholi.a_fraction_is_a_division_problem_a_dec: Fraction obedo division problem. Decimal obedo fraction ki denominator ma opondo me 10, 100, 1000… 1/4 ki 0.25 gubedo kabedo ACEL i line. Common Core 4.NF.6, 4.NF.7, 5.NBT.3.
acholi.two_fractions_four_possible_relationsh: Fractions aryo, relationships 4: acel, gudi ½ landmark, A tidi, onyo B tidi. Cwal sliders, coo gin ma ineno, ki coo comparison rule mamegi.
acholi.adjust_the_numerators_and_denominators: Lok numerators ki denominators pa fractions aryo. Widget nyuto acel me relationships 4. Score pe, reveal pe — cwal ki neno keken.
acholi.hypothesis_free_text_when_do_two_fract: Hypothesis (coo kikom): Kare ki fractions aryo bedo acel? Kare ki acel cok ki ½?
acholi.find_two_fractions_with_different_nume: Nong fractions aryo ki numerators ki denominators mapatpat ma bedo acel.
acholi.what_makes_a_fraction_close_to_what_ab: Ŋo miyo fraction cok ki ½? Ki cok ki 1?
acholi.when_are_two_fractions_easy_to_compare: Kare ki fractions aryo yot me pimo? Kare ki gin tek?
acholi.i_understand_explain_in_my_own_words: Aniaŋ — tit ki lok na kikoma
acholi.explain_how_to_compare_two_fractions_w: Tit kit me pimo fractions aryo labongo loko i decimals.
acholi.design_note_discrete_4_state_outcome_n: Design note: discrete 4-state outcome; fraction-comparison score pe; reveal pe — kit ma oyubbe.
acholi.1_4_tabs_n_new_challenge_ai_tutor_on_m: ⌨️ 1-4: tabs | N: challenge manyen | ?: AI tutor | ← → i marker: kob | Home/End: agiki
acholi.integers_absolute_value_distance_from_: Integers - Absolute value = distance ki zero
acholi.integer_lab_summary: Yab mini lab ka negative numbers gin focus.
acholi.absolute_value_number_line_showing_dis: Absolute value number line ma nyuto distance ki zero
